forecasts.detailed: Rain showers likely between 9am and 5pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 67. Northeast wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

A chance of rain before noon, then a chance of rain and isolated thunderstorms between noon and 4pm. Mostly cloudy. High near 70, with temperatures falling to around 62 in the afternoon. North wind 2 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Isolated Rain Showers then Partly Sunny
forecasts.detailed: Isolated rain showers before 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 61. North wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecasts.short: Chance Rain Showers then Patchy Fog
forecasts.detailed: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 8am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 8am and 3pm. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 59. Northeast wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
Scattered rain showers before 2pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 69. North wind 3 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

Patchy fog between 7am and 8am, then a slight chance of rain showers between 10am and 3pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 73. Northwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
